# Format: <expect:ignore|keep> <path>
# "ignore" cases must be caught by foundry-security's .gitignore baseline (skills/foundry-security/SKILL.md step 1).
# "keep" cases must NOT be caught (false positives would block legitimate files from being committed).
ignore .env
ignore .env.local
ignore .env.production
ignore secrets.env
ignore real.pem
ignore real.key.txt
ignore config.yaml
ignore config.yaml.bak
ignore config.prod.yml
ignore secret.yaml
ignore secret.json
ignore my-secret.yaml
ignore app_secret.yaml
ignore aws_credentials.json
ignore my-credentials.yaml
ignore src/config/secrets.yaml
ignore db.credentials
ignore api.credentials.json
keep .env.example
keep secretary_notes.txt
keep api_keynote.md
keep the_keymaster.rb
keep monkey.py
keep notes.md
keep package.json
